title: Roadies Revolution
subTitle: Participants, selected from different parts of the country via auditions, compete against each other in various tasks to win the grand prize.

title: Kaisi Yeh Yaariaan
subTitle: Alya tutors Dhruv about how to make a girl fall in love with a boy. Nandini can't trace her way back home and stays with Manik. Raghav fears his relation with Kabir will soon be found.

title: Night Out
subTitle: A compilation of the greatest foot-tapping hits to sing along to are played back to back in order to entertain the audience.

title: Roadies Real Heroes
subTitle: The contestants prepare for the elimination round. Subsequently, the gang leaders become embroiled in a dispute over their respective advice.

title: Roadies
subTitle: The Roadies ride to Chandigarh where they compete with the students of DAV College. Later, they eat at a restaurant for free and also wash the dishes.
